name: Poached Lobster Delights and Garden Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Louis Kemp Lobster Delights, chunks
3 cups Fresh vegetables (broccoli florets, carrot and zucchini slices)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chicken broth, garlic powder, dried basil, thyme, oregano leaves, and cornstarch in a saucepan.
2. Cook and stir on medium heat until the mixture thickens and boils.
3. Add the mushrooms, lobster delights chunks, and fresh vegetables to the saucepan.
4. Cover; reduce heat and simmer for about 10 minutes or until the vegetables are tender-crisp, stirring once during cooking.
5. Stir in the lime juice and margarine before serving.
